narrative:
Indian Hill E (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,129 registered voters, with 56.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.6 percentage points.
